channel.title: Trend Micro Research, News and Perspectives
channel.copyright: Respective post owners and feed distributors

item.title: Vibe Hacking: Two AI-Augmented Campaigns Target Government and Financial Sectors in Latin America
item.description: TrendAI™ Research has identified two emerging threat campaigns—SHADOW-AETHER-040 and SHADOW-AETHER-064—that use agentic AI to drive intrusion operations against government and financial organizations in Latin America, marking these among the first cases we have observed of AI agents executing attacks from initial access to data exfiltration.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Joseph C Chen

item.title: What Is the Instructure Canvas Breach? Impact, Risks, and What Institutions Should Do
item.description: The Instructure Canvas breach affects universities, K–12 school districts, and teaching hospitals globally. This blog entry intends to provide context and practical guidance.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Johnny Hand

item.title: Supporting the National Cyber Strategy: How TrendAI™ Helps
item.description: A deeper look at the first three pillars and outlining how our capabilities directly support government agencies working to bring this strategy to life.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Jon Clay

item.title: InstallFix and Claude Code: How Fake Install Pages Lead to Real Compromise
item.description: Targeting multiple industries worldwide, the InstallFix campaign uses fake Claude AI installer pages to trick users into running malware that collects system information, disables security features, achieves persistence, and connects to attacker-controlled C&C servers for additional payloads.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Allixon Kristoffer Francisco

item.title: Quasar Linux (QLNX) – A Silent Foothold in the Supply Chain: Inside a Full-Featured Linux RAT With Rootkit, PAM Backdoor, Credential Harvesting Capabilities
item.description: TrendAI™ Research breaks down Quasar Linux (QLNX), a previously undocumented sophisticated Linux RAT with low detection rates. In this blog, we examine a full-featured Linux threat incorporating a rootkit, a PAM backdoor, credential harvesting, and more, revealing how this malware enables stealthy access, persistence, and potential supply-chain attacks.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Aliakbar Zahravi

item.title: Inside Shadow-Earth-053: A China-Aligned Cyberespionage Campaign Against Government and Defense Sectors in Asia
item.description: A China-aligned threat group is exploiting unpatched Microsoft Exchange vulnerabilities to conduct cyberespionage against government and critical infrastructure targets across Asia and beyond.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Daniel Lunghi

item.title: Kuse Web App Abused to Host Phishing Document
item.description: Bad actors took advantage of the legitimate name and services of Kuse, a popular AI-based app designed for workplaces. The attackers exploited the users’ trust in Kuse to carry out a phishing attack.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Jed Valderama

item.title: Void Dokkaebi Uses Fake Job Interview Lure to Spread Malware via Code Repositories
item.description: Our research on Void Dokkaebi’s operations uncovered a campaign that turns infected developer repositories into malware delivery channels. By spreading through trusted workflows, organizational codebases, and open-source projects, the threat can scale from a single compromise to a broader supply chain risk.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Feike Hacquebord

item.title: The Vercel Breach: OAuth Supply Chain Attack Exposes the Hidden Risk in Platform Environment Variables
item.description: An OAuth supply chain compromise at Vercel exposed how trusted third party apps and platform environment variables can bypass traditional defenses and amplify blast radius. This article examines the attack chain, underlying design tradeoffs, and what it reveals about modern PaaS and software supply chain risk.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Peter Girnus

item.title: Identity Protection in the AI Era
item.description: Enterprises aiming to predict and mitigate human, machine, and AI‑agent risks at scale demand AI‑powered identity‑first security without compromise.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Sara Atie

item.title: U.S. Public Sector Under Siege: Threat Intelligence for Q1 2026
item.description: The first quarter of 2026 has reinforced a hard truth: U.S. government agencies and educational institutions are operating in the most hostile cyber threat environment ever recorded.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Jon Clay

item.title: Claude Code Packaging Error Remains a Lure in an Active Campaign: What Defenders Should Do
item.description: Threat actors leveraged Anthropic’s Claude Code npm release packaging error to distribute Vidar, GhostSocks, and PureLog Stealer. This blog details immediate steps organizations can take and best practices to prevent further risk.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Jacob Santos

item.title: Weaponizing Trust Signals: Claude Code Lures and GitHub Release Payloads
item.description: A packaging error in Anthropic’s Claude Code npm release briefly exposed internal source code. This entry examines how threat actors rapidly weaponized the resulting attention, pivoting an existing AI-themed campaign to spread Vidar and GhostSocks.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Jacob Santos

item.title: TrendAI Insight: New U.S. National Cyber Strategy
item.description: TrendAI reviews the White House National Cyber Strategy, outlining six pillars to strengthen U.S. cybersecurity—from deterrence and regulation to federal modernization, critical infrastructure protection, AI leadership, and workforce development.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Jon Clay

item.title: TrendAI™ Research at RSAC 2026: Advancing Defense Across AI‑Driven and Cyber‑Physical Threats
item.description: TrendAI™ Research explored agentic AI cybercrime and EV infrastructure security through two research sessions at RSAC 2026.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: TrendAI™ Research

item.title: The Real Risk of Vibecoding
item.description: This blog looks at how AI‑driven vibecoding speeds up software development while increasing security risk by outpacing traditional review and ownership. It explains why security needs to move earlier and be built into modern development workflows.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Bestin Koruthu

item.title: Axios NPM Package Compromised: Supply Chain Attack Hits JavaScript HTTP Client with 100M+ Weekly Downloads
item.description: A supply chain attack hit Axios when attackers used stolen npm credentials to publish malicious versions containing a phantom dependency. This triggered a cross-platform RAT during installation and replaced its files with clean decoys, making detection challenging.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Peter Girnus

item.title: TeamPCP’s Telnyx Attack Marks a Shift in Tactics Beyond LiteLLM
item.description: Moving beyond their LiteLLM campaign, TeamPCP weaponizes the Telnyx Python SDK with stealthy WAV‑based payloads to steal credentials across Linux, macOS, and Windows.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: John Rainier Navato

item.title: Pawn Storm Campaign Deploys PRISMEX, Targets Government and Critical Infrastructure Entities
item.description: This blog discusses the steganography, cloud abuse, and email-based backdoors used against the Ukrainian defense supply chain in the latest Pawn Storm campaign that TrendAI™ Research observed and analyzed.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Feike Hacquebord

item.title: Your AI Gateway Was a Backdoor: Inside the LiteLLM Supply Chain Compromise
item.description: TeamPCP orchestrated one of the most sophisticated multi-ecosystem supply chain campaigns publicly documented to date that cascaded through developer tooling and compromised LiteLLM, exposing how AI proxy services that concentrate API keys and cloud credentials become high-value collateral when supply chain attacks compromise upstream dependencies.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Peter Girnus

item.title: Your AI Stack Just Handed Over Your Root Keys: Inside the litellm PyPI Breach
item.description: Litellm PyPI breach explained: malicious versions steal cloud credentials, SSH keys, and Kubernetes secrets. Learn impact and urgent mitigation steps.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Fernando Tucci

item.title: Copyright Lures Mask a Multi‑Stage PureLog Stealer Attack on Key Industries
item.description: We look into a stealthy multi‑stage attack campaign that delivers PureLog Stealer entirely in memory using encrypted, fileless techniques.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Mohamed Fahmy

item.title: Why East-West Visibility Matters for Grid Security
item.description: Learn how east-west traffic visibility helps detect and stop lateral movement attacks inside electric grid infrastructure and critical OT networks.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
item.author: Vitaliy Shtym

item.title: From Misconfigured Spring Boot Actuator to SharePoint Exfiltration: How Stolen Credentials Bypass MFA
item.description: Not every cloud breach starts with malware or a zero-day. In this incident, attackers discovered an exposed Spring Boot Actuator endpoint, harvested credentials from leaked configuration data, then used the OAuth2 Resource Owner Password Credentials (ROPC) flow to authenticate without MFA.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Ryan Soliven

item.title: Web Shells, Tunnels, and Ransomware: Dissecting a Warlock Attack
item.description: Warlock continues to enhance its attack chain with new tactics to improve persistence, lateral movement, and defense evasion using an expanded toolset: TightVNC Yuze, and a persistent BYOVD technique leveraging the NSec driver.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Maristel Policarpio

item.title: Securing Autonomous AI Agents with TrendAI & NVIDIA OpenShell
item.description: Learn how TrendAI and NVIDIA OpenShell help secure autonomous AI agents and build trusted enterprise AI systems with stronger visibility and control.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Fernando Cardoso

item.title: TrendAI™ Supports Global Law Enforcement Efforts
item.description: Learn how TrendAI™ and our researchers contributed threat intelligence and analysis to support INTERPOL against cybercrime.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: TrendAI™ Research

item.title: CISOs in a Pinch: A Security Analysis of OpenClaw
item.description: Learn about OpenClaw (a sovereign agent) and how this can be viable for enterprises.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Fernando Tucci

item.title: Through the Lens of MDR: Analysis of KongTuke’s ClickFix Abuse of Compromised WordPress Sites
item.description: Our analysis of an active KongTuke campaign deploying modeloRAT — malware capable of reconnaissance, command execution, and persistent access — through compromised WordPress sites and fake CAPTCHA lures shows that the group still operates this delivery chain in parallel with the newer CrashFix technique.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Aira Marcelo

item.title: TrendAI™ at [un]prompted 2026: From KYC Exploits to Agentic Defense
item.description: At [un]prompted 2026, TrendAI™ demonstrated how documents can be used to exploit AI-driven KYC pipelines and introduced FENRIR, an automated system for discovering AI vulnerabilities at scale.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: TrendAI™ Research

item.title: New BoryptGrab Stealer Targets Windows Users via Deceptive GitHub Pages
item.description: The BoryptGrab campaign uses fake SEO‑optimized GitHub repositories and deceptive download pages to distribute a data‑stealing malware family that delivers multiple payloads, including a reverse SSH backdoor, to Windows users.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Mingyue Shirley Yang

item.title: Europol, Microsoft, TrendAI™ and Collaborators Halt Tycoon 2FA Operations
item.description: Tycoon 2FA was dismantled this week by law enforcement and industry partners including TrendAI™. The phishing-as-a-service platform offered MFA bypass services using adversary-in-the-middle (AitM) proxying.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Christopher Boyton

item.title: Claude Code Security set the Cybersecurity Stocks on Fire - Here's the Signal in the Smoke
item.description: Learn how Claude Code Security set Cybersecurity stocks on fire.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Fernando Tucci

item.title: Malicious OpenClaw Skills Used to Distribute Atomic macOS Stealer
item.description: Malicious OpenClaw skills trick AI agents and users into installing a new AMOS variant that steals extensive data at scale.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Alfredo Oliveira

item.title: Spam Campaign Abuses Atlassian Jira, Targets Government and Corporate Entities
item.description: We uncover how a campaign used Atlassian Jira Cloud to launch automated and targeted spam campaigns, exploiting trusted SaaS workflows to bypass security controls.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: TrendAI™ Research

item.title: U.S. Public Sector Under Siege
item.description: Discover why Government and Education must prioritize Cyber Risk Management.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Jon Clay

item.title: Viral AI, Invisible Risks: What OpenClaw Reveals About Agentic Assistants
item.description: OpenClaw (aka Clawdbot or Moltbot) represents a new frontier in agentic AI: powerful, highly autonomous, and surprisingly easy to use. In this research, we examine how its capabilities compare to its predecessors’ and highlight the security risks inherent to the agentic AI paradigm.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Salvatore Gariuolo

item.title: PeckBirdy: A Versatile Script Framework for LOLBins Exploitation Used by China-aligned Threat Groups
item.description: PeckBirdy is a sophisticated JScript-based C&C framework used by China-aligned APT groups to exploit LOLBins across multiple environments, delivering advanced backdoors to target gambling industries and Asian government entities.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Ted Lee

item.title: Embracing Choice in Cybersecurity: TrendAI Vision One™ and SentinelOne Integration
item.description: Discover how the TrendAI Vision One and SentinelOne integration exemplifies our commitment to endpoint flexibility.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Jenny Hua

item.title: Pwn2Own: Researchers Earn $1 Million for 76 Zero-Days
item.description: Discover how TrendAI Zero Day Initiative (ZDI) identified critical vulnerabilities across connected vehicles, EV chargers, and automotive systems.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Trend Micro Research

item.title: Watering Hole Attack Targets EmEditor Users with Information-Stealing Malware
item.description: TrendAI™ Research provides a technical analysis of a compromised EmEditor installer used to deliver multistage malware that performs a range of malicious actions.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Don Ovid Ladores

item.title: From Extension to Infection: An In-Depth Analysis of the Evelyn Stealer Campaign Targeting Software Developers
item.description: This blog entry provides an in-depth analysis of the multistage delivery of the Evelyn information stealer, which was used in a campaign targeting software developers.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Ahmed Mohamed Ibrahim

item.title: Your 100 Billion Parameter Behemoth is a Liability
item.description: The "bigger is better" era of AI is hitting a wall. We are in an LLM bubble, characterized by ruinous inference costs and diminishing returns. The future belongs to Agentic AI powered by specialized Small Language Models (SLMs). Think of it as a shift from hiring a single expensive genius to running a highly efficient digital factory. It’s cheaper, faster, and frankly, the only way to make agents work at scale.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Fernando Tucci

item.title: Introducing ÆSIR: Finding Zero-Day Vulnerabilities at the Speed of AI
item.description: TrendAI™’s ÆSIR platform combines AI automation with expert oversight to discover zero-day vulnerabilities in AI infrastructure – 21 CVEs across NVIDIA, Tencent, and MLflow since mid-2025.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Peter Girnus

item.title: Key Insights on SHADOW-AETHER-015 and Earth Preta from the 2025 MITRE ATT&CK Evaluation with TrendAI Vision One™
item.description: This blog discusses notable modern TTPs observed from SHADOW-AETHER-015 and Earth Preta, from TrendAI Research™ monitoring and TrendAI Vision One™ intelligence. These findings support the performance of TrendAI™ in the 2025 MITRE ATT&CK Evaluations.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Analyzing a Multi-Stage AsyncRAT Campaign via Managed Detection and Response
item.description: Threat actors exploited Cloudflare's free-tier infrastructure and legitimate Python environments to deploy the AsyncRAT remote access trojan, demonstrating advanced evasion techniques that abuse trusted cloud services for malicious operations.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
item.author: Buddy Tancio

item.title: Get Executives on board with managing Cyber Risk
item.description: Learn how the 2025 Trend Micro Defenders Survey Report helps paint a clear picture of how security teams are looking to work with executive leaders to manage cyber risk.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Trend Micro's Pivotal Role in INTERPOL's Operation Sentinel: Dismantling Digital Extortion Networks Across Africa
item.description: Continuing a Legacy of Successful Collaboration
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: What Does it Take to Manage Cloud Risk?
item.description: Learn why hybrid and multi-cloud environments are vital for IT and business success from our 2025 Trend Micro Defenders Survey.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: What Cyber Defenders Really Think About AI Risk
item.description: Learn how Trend Micro's 2025 Trend Micro Defenders Survey Report highlights current AI-related cybersecurity priorities and where security professionals use AI to their advantage.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
